name: OpenCorporates by OpenRiskPlatform
description: Searches companies and officers in OpenCorporates and returns normalized OpenRisk entities.

entrypoints.name: Company Search
entrypoints.description: Searches OpenCorporates companies and returns organization entities.

inputs.name: search_input
inputs.title: Search Input
inputs.description: Free-text company or officer name to search in OpenCorporates.

inputs.name: jurisdiction_code
inputs.title: Jurisdiction Code
inputs.description: Optional OpenCorporates jurisdiction code such as gb, us_de, or sk.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.title: Result Limit
inputs.description: Total number of entities to return across paginated API requests (1-200).

inputs.name: inactive
inputs.title: Inactive Filter
inputs.description: If true, only inactive records are returned. If false, inactive records are excluded. If omitted, OpenCorporates default behavior is used.

entrypoints.name: Officer Search
entrypoints.description: Searches OpenCorporates officers and returns person entities.

inputs.name: search_input
inputs.title: Search Input
inputs.description: Free-text company or officer name to search in OpenCorporates.

inputs.name: jurisdiction_code
inputs.title: Jurisdiction Code
inputs.description: Optional OpenCorporates jurisdiction code such as gb, us_de, or sk.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.title: Result Limit
inputs.description: Total number of entities to return across paginated API requests (1-200).

inputs.name: inactive
inputs.title: Inactive Filter
inputs.description: If true, only inactive records are returned. If false, inactive records are excluded. If omitted, OpenCorporates default behavior is used.

settings.name: token
settings.title: OpenCorporates API Token
settings.description: API token used for authenticated requests to OpenCorporates.

metrics.name: status
metrics.title: Status
metrics.description: Short summary of the current OpenCorporates API quota or remaining requests.

metrics.name: api_requests
metrics.title: API Requests
metrics.description: Number of OpenCorporates HTTP requests made during execution.

metrics.name: result_count
metrics.title: Result Count
metrics.description: Number of normalized entities returned by the entrypoint.

metrics.name: requested_limit
metrics.title: Requested Limit
metrics.description: Requested total result limit for the entrypoint run.

metrics.name: pages_fetched
metrics.title: Pages Fetched
metrics.description: Number of paginated OpenCorporates result pages fetched.

metrics.name: api_total_count
metrics.title: API Total Count
metrics.description: Total count reported by OpenCorporates for the query when available.

metrics.name: last_status_code
metrics.title: Last HTTP Status
metrics.description: HTTP status code from the last OpenCorporates API request.
